name: Artichokes Truffle Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare artichokes as directed in "Cleaning artichokes - Jewish Style". Cut them in half lengthwise and keep in lemon water.
2. Heat 1/4 cup of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Drain 6 artichoke halves very well.
4. Cut the drained artichokes into thin slivers directly into the hot oil.
5. Fry, stirring frequently, for 10 minutes or until the slices are golden brown and crisp.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste and continue frying until all slices are cooked through.
7. Transfer the fried artichoke slices to a hot serving dish and keep warm.
8. Repeat with the remaining oil and artichokes.
